name: context-meter
description: Track Codex and Claude Code context usage in the VS Code status bar.

agentTokenStatus.sessionsRoot.description: Optional absolute path to the Codex sessions directory. Leave empty to use ~/.codex/sessions.

agentTokenStatus.claudeRoot.description: Optional absolute path to the Claude Code home directory. Leave empty to use ~/.claude.

agentTokenStatus.refreshIntervalMs.description: How often to refresh token usage from local agent session files.
